name: open-science-skills
description: Claude Code skills for experimental social science methodology, computational text analysis, manuscript QA, and transparent reporting

plugins.name: oss
plugins.description: Open Science Skills — 29 skills for experimental social science: conjoint design / cleaning / diagnostics, survey design, list experiments, cross-national design, topic modeling, LLM text classification, VLM-OCR + post-OCR cleanup, FAIR manuscript checks, citation checking, source-claim fact-checking, literature-review evidence mapping, figure design, table design, house-style LaTeX paper formatting from any draft (paper-tex), figure/table auditing, replication-package scaffolding, hypothesis building, narrative building, pre-registration writing, methods reporting, creative divergence (diverge + diverge-codex), paper-review-lite, paper-review-lite-codex, presubmit, and journal-review. All skills auto-trigger from context and are available as /oss:skill-name slash commands (or just /skill-name when there is no ambiguity).
